explanation: This command simulates the execution of mstsc.exe with a local .rdp file located in a suspicious directory (\Users\Public\), as defined in the Sigma rule. The command uses quotes to safely handle the file path.

This command simulates the execution of mstsc.exe with a local .rdp file located in a suspicious directory (\Windows\Temp\), as defined in the Sigma rule. No additional syntax is needed since the path does not require quotes.

This command simulates the execution of mstsc.exe with a local .rdp file located in a suspicious directory (\AppData\Local\Temp\), as defined in the Sigma rule. The command uses quotes to safely handle the file path.

This command simulates the execution of mstsc.exe with a local .rdp file located in a suspicious directory (\Downloads\), as defined in the Sigma rule. No additional syntax is needed since the path does not require quotes.
